name: Achabal Mughal Garden
description: One of the most splendid terraced Mughal gardens in India. It is beautifully fed by a powerful natural spring that flows dramatically over several terraces and waterfalls.
history: Built in 1620 AD by the Mughal Empress Nur Jahan. It was her absolute favorite summer retreat.
famousFor: Cascading springs, Chinar trees, Empress Nur Jahan's retreat.
